mapper.insert:
insert into test_product_type(product_type_name, is_valid, code, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time, remark) values
(#{entity.productTypeName}, #{entity.isValid}, #{entity.code}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.delFlag}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.remark})

insert into test_product_type(product_type_name, is_valid, code, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time, remark) values
(#{entity.productTypeName}, #{entity.isValid}, #{entity.code}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.delFlag}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.remark})
on duplicate key update product_type_name = values(product_type_name) , is_valid = values(is_valid) , code = values(code) , status = values(status) , del_flag = values(del_flag) , create_time = values(create_time) , update_time = values(update_time) , remark = values(remark)
